mapper.sql: id, exam_id, paper_id, question_id, student_id, answer_content, question_score, actual_score, objective_flag, correct_flag, marking_status, teacher_comment, submit_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: select from student_answer where deleted = 0 and id = #{id} limit 1

select sa. from student_answer sa inner join exam e on sa.exam_id = e.id and e.deleted = 0 where sa.deleted = 0 and sa.marking_status = 'WAIT_MARKING' and e.creator_id = #{teacherId} order by sa.exam_id asc, sa.student_id asc, sa.id asc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select count(distinct concat(sa.exam_id, '-', sa.student_id)) from student_answer sa inner join exam e on sa.exam_id = e.id and e.deleted = 0 where sa.deleted = 0 and sa.marking_status = 'WAIT_MARKING' and e.creator_id = #{teacherId}
mapper.insert: insert into student_answer(exam_id, paper_id, question_id, student_id, answer_content, question_score, actual_score, objective_flag, correct_flag, marking_status, teacher_comment, submit_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{examId}, #{paperId}, #{questionId}, #{studentId}, #{answerContent}, #{questionScore}, #{actualScore}, #{objectiveFlag}, #{correctFlag}, #{markingStatus}, #{teacherComment}, #{submitTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update student_answer set answer_content = #{answerContent}, question_score = #{questionScore}, actual_score = #{actualScore}, objective_flag = #{objectiveFlag}, correct_flag = #{correctFlag}, marking_status = #{markingStatus}, teacher_comment = #{teacherComment}, submit_time = #{submitTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
